message:
Fix INSERT affected-row counting, UTF-8 json_error_position, index_regen text conversion, and codegen test helpers

Four focused correctness fixes across the core, ext-json, mvcc, and vdbe crates:

- connection.rs: Fix INSERT affected-row counting to use the actual affected count
  returned by execute_with_params instead of unconditionally adding 1. Multi-row
  INSERTs and INSERT-or-IGNORE statements now report the correct number of rows
  actually inserted rather than always counting each statement execution as one.

- ext-json/lib.rs: Fix json_error_position to use character-based position tracking
  for multi-byte UTF-8 input instead of byte-based indexing. The function now
  counts characters independently from char_indices byte offsets, and advances
  column tracking by char byte length, producing correct error positions for
  strings containing non-ASCII characters.

- index_regen.rs: Replace the standalone sqlite_value_to_text helper with calls
  to the SqliteValue::to_text() method, reducing code duplication. Also replace
  the catch-all match arm in eval_function("length") with explicit Integer and
  Float arms for clearer type handling.

- vdbe/codegen.rs: Migrate test code from verbose ColumnInfo { ... } struct
  literals to the new ColumnInfo::basic() constructor, and add the type_name,
  notnull, and default_value fields where full struct syntax is still used.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
